case_title: FENIGER MANI TERRY VS DIVACK DOROTHY DBA CENTER OF EXCELLENCE.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FENIGER MANI TERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIVACK DOROTHY DBA CENTER OF EXCELLENCE. $137.50 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $165.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $137.50 FILED BY FENIGER MANI TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT DIVACK DOROTHY DBA CENTER OF EXCELLENCE. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIVACK DOROTHY DBA CENTER OF EXCELLENCE.
